channel.title: Notebooks on Kraft Masonry
channel.description: Recent content in Notebooks on Kraft Masonry

item.title: On Keeping a Paper Notebook in 2026
item.description: My phone has seventeen note-taking apps installed. I use none of them. I use a gridded A5 notebook and a fountain pen that cost eleven euros and has been refilled so many times the barrel is permanently stained with blue-black ink.
